message:
Aggregate tool results into single TurnToolResults turn per spec 2.4

Tool results from a single round are now stored as a single
TurnToolResults turn with multiple ContentPart entries, instead of
individual TurnTool turns. Message conversion expands them back to
individual tool-role messages for the LLM. Context management
(observation masking, checkpoint, summarization) updated accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,11 +9,12 @@ import (
 type TurnKind string
 
 const (
-	TurnUserInput TurnKind = "USER_INPUT"
-	TurnSteering  TurnKind = "STEERING"
-	TurnAssistant TurnKind = "ASSISTANT"
-	TurnTool      TurnKind = "TOOL"
-	TurnSystem    TurnKind = "SYSTEM"
+	TurnUserInput   TurnKind = "USER_INPUT"
+	TurnSteering    TurnKind = "STEERING"
+	TurnAssistant   TurnKind = "ASSISTANT"
+	TurnTool        TurnKind = "TOOL"        // Deprecated: use TurnToolResults for new code.
+	TurnToolResults TurnKind = "TOOL_RESULTS" // Aggregated tool results from one round.
+	TurnSystem      TurnKind = "SYSTEM"
 )
 
 // Turn is the Session's typed history item. Steering turns are kept distinct for observability,
